assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in the original: Role="Rust backend service", Serena Instance="serena_backend", Path="/home/user/trustify-backend")
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 16: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — all values match the expected originals exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 17: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — trustify-ui is present as a new row with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as originally configured (Cloud ID=2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID=10142, customfield_10875, customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 21-25: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747' — all fields preserved exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has '## Preserved (unchanged)' section listing trustify-backend row, all Jira fields, and Code Intelligence content as preserved. '## Added (new content)' section lists trustify-ui row and serena_ui limitation as new additions. Clear separation of preserved vs. added.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Discovered Instances table: serena_backend Status='Already configured in Repository Registry', serena_ui Status='NEW — not yet in Repository Registry'. Also section headers: '### serena_backend (already configured)' with 'Existing Registry entry found — no action needed' and '### serena_ui (newly discovered)' with 'No existing Registry entry found'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 29-43: Naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.'), example code block using serena_backend (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol), and serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use') are all preserved. The only new addition is line 43: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.
